title: Helix Design System Expansion Roadmap
goal: Transform 13 prototype components into a production-grade, enterprise healthcare web component library with 50+ components, framework adapters, observability platform, and enterprise features over 24 months across 5 phases.

milestones.title: Phase 1: Production-Grade Foundation
milestones.description: Take 13 existing prototype components to enterprise quality (Grade A health scores). Migrate token pipeline to W3C DTCG format. Achieve 80%+ test coverage. Publish @helix/library@0.1.0 to npm. 12 weeks, ~46 engineering days.

phases.name: migrate-tokens-to-w3c-dtcg-format-via-style-dictionary-4-x
phases.title: Migrate tokens to W3C DTCG format via Style Dictionary 4.x
phases.description: Migrate token source from flat JSON to W3C Design Token Community Group format. Set up Style Dictionary 4.x build pipeline to generate CSS custom properties and Lit tagged templates from DTCG source tokens. Three-tier cascade: primitive → semantic (--hx-color-primary) → component (--hx-button-bg).
acceptanceCriteria: Token source files converted to W3C DTCG JSON format
Style Dictionary 4.x config generates CSS custom properties
Lit tagged template literals generated for shadow DOM consumption
Three-tier token cascade (primitive → semantic → component) documented
All existing --hx-* tokens preserved with no breaking changes

phases.name: update-all-13-components-to-consume-dtcg-generated-tokens
phases.title: Update all 13 components to consume DTCG-generated tokens
phases.description: Update CSS custom properties in all 13 component style files to use the new DTCG-generated token variables. Ensure three-tier fallback pattern: var(--hx-COMPONENT-PROP, var(--hx-SEMANTIC-TOKEN, HARDCODED-FALLBACK)).
acceptanceCriteria: No hardcoded color, spacing, or typography values remain
Visual regression: components render identically before and after

phases.name: complete-jsdoc-annotations-on-all-13-components
phases.title: Complete JSDoc annotations on all 13 components
phases.description: Add comprehensive JSDoc annotations to every property, event, slot, CSS part, and CSS custom property on all 13 components. These annotations drive CEM generation which feeds Storybook autodocs, Starlight docs, and framework adapter codegen.
acceptanceCriteria: Every @property decorated field has JSDoc with description and default
Every event dispatch has @fires JSDoc tag
Every CSS part has @csspart JSDoc tag
Every CSS custom property has @cssprop JSDoc tag
CEM regeneration produces complete manifest matching public API

phases.name: write-missing-vitest-browser-tests-for-80-coverage
phases.title: Write missing Vitest browser tests for 80%+ coverage
phases.description: Audit test coverage for all 13 components and write missing tests to achieve 80%+ line coverage per component. Focus on: form-associated behavior (ElementInternals), keyboard navigation, slot projection, CSS part styling, event dispatch, and reactive property updates.
acceptanceCriteria: Form-associated components tested with form submission
Keyboard navigation tested for interactive components
Slot projection tested with light DOM content
Event dispatch tested with composed: true where needed
All tests pass in Vitest browser mode (Chromium)

phases.name: add-axe-core-accessibility-tests-to-all-components
phases.title: Add axe-core accessibility tests to all components
phases.description: Add automated accessibility tests using axe-core to every component test file. Use the existing test-utils checkA11y helper. Test in multiple states: default, disabled, error, focused, with content, empty.
acceptanceCriteria: Every component test file includes axe-core checks
Tests cover default, disabled, error, and focused states
Zero axe-core violations across all components
Tests verify ARIA attributes are correctly applied

phases.name: complete-storybook-stories-for-all-variants-and-themes
phases.title: Complete Storybook stories for all variants and themes
phases.description: Create comprehensive Storybook stories for all 13 components covering: all variants/sizes, all states (default, hover, focus, disabled, error), all themes, composition with other components, and responsive behavior. Use CEM-driven autodocs.
acceptanceCriteria: Every component has stories for all visual variants
State stories: default, hover, focus, active, disabled, error
Theme stories: all available themes demonstrated

phases.name: create-starlight-documentation-pages-for-all-13-components
phases.title: Create Starlight documentation pages for all 13 components
phases.description: Create Astro Starlight documentation pages for all 13 components with: overview, API reference (from CEM), usage examples, accessibility guide, Drupal integration, theming guide, and extension guide.
acceptanceCriteria: Every component has a dedicated Starlight page
API reference auto-generated from CEM data
Accessibility section with ARIA patterns and keyboard shortcuts
Drupal integration section with Twig template examples
Theming section showing token override patterns

phases.name: establish-vrt-baselines-with-playwright-screenshots
phases.title: Establish VRT baselines with Playwright screenshots
phases.description: Set up Visual Regression Testing using Playwright to capture baseline screenshots of all 13 components across all themes (default, dark, high-contrast, etc.). Configure CI to run VRT on every PR.
acceptanceCriteria: Playwright VRT configured in CI pipeline
Baseline screenshots captured for all 13 components
Screenshots in multiple viewport sizes (mobile, tablet, desktop)
CI fails on visual regressions beyond threshold

phases.name: finalize-extension-api-contracts-and-contract-tests
phases.title: Finalize extension API contracts and contract tests
phases.description: Define and document the stable extension API for all 13 components. Consumers extend Helix components (e.g., PatientCard extends HelixCard) — the extension API must have a versioned contract with tests that prevent accidental breakage.
acceptanceCriteria: Extension API documented for all 13 components
Contract tests verify extension points work correctly
Version contract documented (what can break in major vs minor)
Example extension class for each component

phases.name: run-health-scorer-on-all-13-components-and-fix-to-grade-a
phases.title: Run health scorer on all 13 components and fix to Grade A
phases.description: Run the admin dashboard health scorer on all 13 components. Fix any dimension scoring below 90 to achieve Grade A (90+) across all 17 dimensions: API docs, CEM completeness, test coverage, accessibility, type safety, docs coverage, story coverage, bundle size, token compliance, Drupal readiness, VRT, cross-browser, code quality, Lit best practices, security, maintainability, DX.
acceptanceCriteria: All 13 components score Grade A (90+) on health scorer
Health score report published to admin dashboard
Remediation documented for any recurring issues

phases.name: set-up-changesets-for-semantic-versioning
phases.title: Set up changesets for semantic versioning
phases.description: Configure changesets for automated semantic versioning and changelog generation. Integrate with CI to require changeset entries for PRs that modify public API.
acceptanceCriteria: CI check requires changeset for public API changes

phases.name: set-up-npm-publishing-workflow-and-publish-beta
phases.title: Set up npm publishing workflow and publish beta
phases.description: Configure CI/CD pipeline for automated npm publishing. Publish @helix/library@0.1.0-beta.1 to npm under @helixds namespace. Set up provenance signing and package verification.
acceptanceCriteria: npm publishing workflow in CI (triggered by changeset version PR)
Package.json exports field correctly maps all entry points

phases.name: external-testing-in-drupal-11-and-next-js-15
phases.title: External testing in Drupal 11 and Next.js 15
phases.description: Install published @helix/library beta in fresh Drupal 11 and Next.js 15 projects. Verify all 13 components render correctly, form-associated components work with framework forms, theming works, and SSR doesn't break.
acceptanceCriteria: All 13 components render in Drupal 11 Twig templates
All 13 components render in Next.js 15 with React
Form-associated components work with native form submission
Theming via CSS custom properties works in both environments
No SSR hydration errors in Next.js

milestones.title: Phase 2: Component Expansion
milestones.description: Expand from 13 to 30+ components covering full healthcare content hub needs. Add 12 Tier 1 primitives + 10 Tier 2 composed components. Build @helix/cli, @helix/tailwind-preset. Publish @helix/library@1.0.0 stable. Months 4-8.

phases.name: implement-hx-dialog-component
phases.title: Implement hx-dialog component
phases.description: Build hx-dialog: modal/non-modal dialog with focus trap, backdrop, animations. Required for confirmations, forms, media previews. Uses native <dialog> element internally. Trigger via Drupal behavior; composed: true events cross Shadow DOM.
acceptanceCriteria: CSS parts: dialog, backdrop, header, body, footer

phases.name: implement-hx-tabs-component
phases.title: Implement hx-tabs component
phases.description: Build hx-tabs: tabbed content organizer with horizontal/vertical orientations. Content organization pattern used on every healthcare site. Manual and automatic activation modes.

phases.name: implement-hx-accordion-component
phases.title: Implement hx-accordion component
phases.description: Build hx-accordion: collapsible content sections for FAQ, expandable content. Progressive enhancement with <details>/<summary> fallback. Single and multi-expand modes.
acceptanceCriteria: CSS parts: item, trigger, content, icon

phases.name: implement-hx-tooltip-component
phases.title: Implement hx-tooltip component
phases.description: Build hx-tooltip: contextual help text and abbreviations. Uses @floating-ui/dom for smart positioning. Trigger on hover/focus with configurable delay.

phases.name: implement-hx-avatar-component
phases.title: Implement hx-avatar component
phases.description: Build hx-avatar: user/provider profile images with fallback initials and status indicators. Used for healthcare provider profiles.
acceptanceCriteria: Image, initials, and icon fallback modes
Sizes: xs, sm, md, lg, xl

phases.name: implement-hx-breadcrumb-component
phases.title: Implement hx-breadcrumb component
phases.description: Build hx-breadcrumb: navigation breadcrumb trail for content hierarchy. Override breadcrumb.html.twig in Drupal. ARIA landmark with structured data support.
acceptanceCriteria: CSS parts: nav, list, item, separator, link
ARIA: nav with aria-label=Breadcrumb, aria-current=page for last item

phases.name: implement-hx-pagination-component
phases.title: Implement hx-pagination component
phases.description: Build hx-pagination: page navigation for content listings. Override pager.html.twig in Drupal. Supports page numbers, prev/next, and jump-to-page.
acceptanceCriteria: CSS parts: nav, list, item, button, ellipsis

phases.name: implement-hx-icon-component
phases.title: Implement hx-icon component
phases.description: Build hx-icon: SVG icon system with sprite support. Load sprite via Drupal libraries.yml; reference by name. Supports inline SVG and external sprite references.
acceptanceCriteria: Inline SVG and external sprite reference modes
Sizes: xs, sm, md, lg, xl
ARIA: role=img with aria-label, or aria-hidden for decorative

phases.name: implement-hx-progress-component
phases.title: Implement hx-progress component
phases.description: Build hx-progress: progress bar for form completion, loading, and upload states. Connect to Drupal AJAX progress events. Determinate and indeterminate modes.

phases.name: implement-hx-skeleton-component
phases.title: Implement hx-skeleton component
phases.description: Build hx-skeleton: loading placeholder for BigPipe content streaming in Drupal. Text, circular, rectangular variants with pulse animation.

phases.name: implement-hx-divider-component
phases.title: Implement hx-divider component
phases.description: Build hx-divider: visual separator for content sections and field groups. Horizontal and vertical orientations. Simple TWIG usage, no JS needed beyond CE registration.

phases.name: implement-hx-nav-component
phases.title: Implement hx-nav component
phases.description: Build hx-nav: primary and secondary navigation component. Supports horizontal menu bar and vertical sidebar patterns. Mobile responsive with hamburger toggle.
acceptanceCriteria: CSS parts: nav, list, item, link, toggle
Keyboard: arrow keys, Enter, Escape for submenus
ARIA: role=navigation, aria-current, aria-expanded for submenus

phases.name: build-drupal-sdc-auto-generation-from-cem
phases.title: Build Drupal SDC auto-generation from CEM
phases.description: Create a build step that generates Drupal Single Directory Component (SDC) definitions from the Custom Elements Manifest. Each component gets a .component.yml with props, slots, and schema auto-mapped from CEM data.
acceptanceCriteria: Props mapped from CEM attributes with correct types
CI step validates generated SDCs match CEM

phases.name: build-helix-tailwind-preset-package
phases.title: Build @helix/tailwind-preset package
phases.description: Create a Tailwind CSS preset that maps Helix design tokens to Tailwind utility classes. Consumers install the preset and get Helix-aligned colors, spacing, typography, and shadows in their Tailwind projects.
acceptanceCriteria: Dark mode support via data-theme attribute

phases.name: build-helix-cli-tool
phases.title: Build @helix/cli tool
phases.description: Create a ShadCN-style CLI that lets developers copy individual components into their projects (BYOS path 3). Uses @clack/prompts for interactive UI. Commands: init, add, diff, update.
acceptanceCriteria: helix init - initialize project with token config
helix add <component> - copy component source into project
helix diff <component> - show diff between local and upstream
helix update <component> - update component preserving local changes
Respects project tsconfig and import paths

phases.name: publish-helix-library-1-0-0-stable-release
phases.title: Publish @helix/library@1.0.0 stable release
phases.description: After all Phase 2 components pass quality gates, publish the 1.0.0 stable release. This is the first production-ready release. Includes all 25+ Tier 1 components, changesets changelog, migration guide from beta.
acceptanceCriteria: Release notes with full component catalog

milestones.title: Phase 3: Framework Adapters
milestones.description: Make Helix accessible to React, Vue, and Angular teams via CEM-generated wrappers. No hand-written wrappers — auto-generate from CEM for zero-maintenance sync. Months 9-12.

phases.name: build-helix-react-package-with-cem-generated-wrappers
phases.title: Build @helix/react package with CEM-generated wrappers
phases.description: Create React wrapper components auto-generated from CEM using @lit/react. Each Helix component gets a typed React wrapper that maps attributes to props, events to callbacks, and slots to children. Published as @helixds/react.
acceptanceCriteria: Typed React wrappers for all components
Events mapped to React callback props (onHxClick, onHxChange, etc.)

phases.name: build-helix-vue-package-with-cem-generated-wrappers
phases.title: Build @helix/vue package with CEM-generated wrappers
phases.description: Create Vue wrapper components auto-generated from CEM. Thin typed wrappers over native web component support. Two-way binding (v-model) support for form components.
acceptanceCriteria: Typed Vue wrappers for all components

phases.name: build-helix-angular-package-with-cem-generated-wrappers
phases.title: Build @helix/angular package with CEM-generated wrappers
phases.description: Create Angular directive wrappers auto-generated from CEM. Uses CUSTOM_ELEMENTS_SCHEMA with typed directive wrappers. Angular schematics for easy installation.
acceptanceCriteria: Typed directive wrappers for all components

phases.name: framework-specific-documentation-and-ssr-compatibility-guide
phases.title: Framework-specific documentation and SSR compatibility guide
phases.description: Add framework-specific sections to Starlight docs: React, Vue, Angular installation guides, SSR/SSG compatibility for Next.js, Nuxt, Astro, SvelteKit. Framework-specific Storybook showing React wrappers.

milestones.title: Phase 4: Observability Platform
milestones.description: Launch Supabase-backed observability platform tracking component health across consumer projects. @helix/telemetry SDK, Panopticon v2 dashboard, usage analytics, error tracking, version drift detection. Months 13-18.

phases.name: build-helix-telemetry-client-sdk
phases.title: Build @helix/telemetry client SDK
phases.description: Lightweight, opt-in client-side telemetry SDK that reports component usage, health metrics, and errors to the Supabase backend. Privacy-first: no PII, configurable reporting, easy opt-out.
acceptanceCriteria: Opt-in only, zero data without explicit consent
Reports: component usage counts, render times, error rates
Configurable reporting interval and data scope
Works in browser and SSR environments

phases.name: build-supabase-observability-backend
phases.title: Build Supabase observability backend
phases.description: Set up Supabase project with schema for telemetry ingestion, health snapshots, usage analytics, and error reports. Both hosted (Supabase Cloud) and self-hosted (Docker Compose) options. Includes data retention policies and automated purging.
acceptanceCriteria: Telemetry ingestion API via Supabase functions

phases.name: build-panopticon-v2-multi-project-dashboard
phases.title: Build Panopticon v2 multi-project dashboard
phases.description: Upgrade the admin dashboard to Panopticon v2 with multi-project views, usage analytics, error tracking, version drift detection, and health score trends over time. Alerting when component health drops.
acceptanceCriteria: Version drift detection (old versions in use)

milestones.title: Phase 5: Enterprise Features
milestones.description: Features driving enterprise adoption and commercial viability: white-labeling, theme marketplace, enterprise support, LTS releases, migration tooling. Months 19-24.

phases.name: build-white-labeling-toolkit-and-theme-cli
phases.title: Build white-labeling toolkit and theme CLI
phases.description: Complete theming toolkit for rebranding Helix components. CLI command (helix theme generate) that produces a full token override package from brand colors. Zero-JavaScript theming via data-theme attribute.
acceptanceCriteria: Brand color input → full token package output
Preview mode to visualize theme before committing

phases.name: establish-lts-release-process-and-migration-tooling
phases.title: Establish LTS release process and migration tooling
phases.description: Define 18-month LTS support windows with security backport process. Build automated migration tooling from Shoelace, Carbon, and Material UI to Helix. CEM-driven analysis of source library + automated wrapper generation.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration guides for top 3 competitor libraries

phases.name: launch-theme-marketplace-and-enterprise-support-tiers
phases.title: Launch theme marketplace and enterprise support tiers
phases.description: Community-contributed theme packages on npm with revenue share. Enterprise support SLA with response time guarantees, dedicated channel, and quarterly architecture reviews. Training materials and certification program.
acceptanceCriteria: Theme marketplace section on Starlight docs

prd.situation: Helix (wc-2026) is an enterprise healthcare web component library built on Lit 3.x with 13 prototype components (hx-button, hx-card, hx-text-input, hx-alert, hx-badge, hx-checkbox, hx-container, hx-form, hx-prose, hx-radio-group, hx-select, hx-switch, hx-textarea). The library has working Storybook, Starlight docs, admin dashboard, and Vitest browser tests but components are at prototype quality, not production-grade.
prd.problem: The 13 existing components lack complete test coverage (80%+), comprehensive accessibility audits, full Storybook stories, extension API contracts, and production token architecture. The library needs to expand to 50+ components, support React/Vue/Angular via CEM-generated wrappers, provide a Tailwind preset and CLI, build an observability platform, and reach enterprise readiness with white-labeling and support tiers.
prd.approach: 5-phase roadmap: Phase 1 (months 1-3) hardens existing 13 components to Grade A health scores with W3C DTCG token pipeline, 80%+ test coverage, and npm publish. Phase 2 (months 4-8) adds 12 Tier 1 primitives + 10 Tier 2 composed components + CLI + Tailwind preset. Phase 3 (months 9-12) generates framework adapters from CEM. Phase 4 (months 13-18) builds Supabase-backed observability. Phase 5 (months 19-24) delivers enterprise features.
prd.results: Production-grade library with 50+ components, @helix/react + @helix/vue + @helix/angular adapters, @helix/cli + @helix/tailwind-preset tooling, Supabase-backed observability platform (Panopticon v2), enterprise white-labeling and support tiers. npm published as @helixds namespace under MIT license.
constraints: All components must pass 7-gate quality pipeline (TypeScript strict, 80%+ test coverage, WCAG 2.1 AA, Storybook stories, CEM accuracy, <5KB per component, 3-tier code review)
Healthcare mandate: WCAG 2.1 AA minimum, zero accessibility regressions
Shadow DOM encapsulation with --hx-* design tokens as only theming mechanism
CEM is single source of truth for Storybook, Starlight, framework adapters, Drupal SDC, MCP servers
Three-tier token fallback: var(--hx-COMPONENT-PROP, var(--hx-SEMANTIC-TOKEN, HARDCODED))
Drupal compatibility: all components work in Twig templates without modification
Bundle budget: <5KB per component gzipped, <50KB full bundle
